title: Symbolic maximum without new material review pressure
scenario: `meta-006` can look like the strongest possible scoring escalation because value and confidence are both maximal, but the current review line already isolates it as a worldview anchor rather than a transferable evidence pattern.
signals_for_escalation: maximal value and confidence profile looks like the strongest possible conviction signal
symbolic boundary force can be misread as a live scoring emergency
the card surface invites over-reading as a general template rather than a known exception
signals_against_escalation: the existing review line already treats the card as a non-transferable worldview anchor
there is no new bounded operational defect or new evidence spike to interpret
the case is already quarantined as symbolic meaning rather than unresolved scoring drift
why_no_material_escalation: The case does not create a fresh unresolved review zone; it remains an already isolated symbolic exception whose surface extremity should not be promoted into new calibration pressure.
why_not_s2_entry_relevant: Nothing here shows that current S1 plus human interpretation cannot read the case. The issue is disciplined reading of a known symbolic maximum, not a missing semantics layer that would justify S2 entry.
why_not_adjacent_escalation_readings: This is not a fresh soft-flag-worthy escalation because no new inflation pattern is being introduced. It is not a justified exception case because the point is not narrow bounded evidence. It is not a real S2-near case because the surface extremity is symbolic rather than proof of a missing scoring axis.
notes: Use this case to prevent overreacting to already-isolated worldview maxima as if they demanded new scoring machinery.
